title: Accommodation in Cases of Calamities, Epidemics or Pandemics, and
content: 42 Other National Emergencies. In cases of calamities, epidemics or pandemics, and other 43 national emergencies, the accommodation facilities shall meet the minimum standards 44 set by the Department. 45 46
